variants.title: Donaldson P166435 O-Ring
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P166435 O-Ring is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: O-Ring, Outer Diameter: 121.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 114.0 mm
